ReportDefinitionEN: The distance learning industry in Italy encompasses educational services delivered remotely via digital platforms, primarily under ATECO 85.59.02.
MarketingDefinitionEN: Italian distance learning companies provide online education platforms and courses targeting manufacturing, Industry 4.0, and professional skills development.
KeywordsIncludeEN: distance learning, e-learning, online education, remote training, digital learning
KeywordsIncludeIT: apprendimento a distanza, e-learning, formazione online
TradeAssociations: AIE - Associazione Italiana Editori, AICA - Associazione Italiana per l'Informatica
AdjacentIndustries: Software development, Information technology services, Testing and certification services
